summary: Frontend testing of Yrvante website (iteration 27). Tested refactoring changes (DienstenPage data extraction to dienstenData.js) and SEO additions for /rebranding and /privacy pages. Found and FIXED 1 critical bug: missing 'Layers' import in DienstenPage.jsx causing /diensten/webdesign to crash. After fix, all 14 tests PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage loads correctly - hero section visible with 'JOUW BEDRIJF ONLINE' heading
2. PASS: Shopping cart icon visible in navigation header (data-testid='nav-cart-icon')
3. PASS: Dark mode toggle works - dark class applied to document
4. PASS: DIENSTEN dropdown works - shows Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud & Hosting links
5. PASS: MEER dropdown works - shows Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog, Pakketten & Prijzen, Privacybeleid links
6. PASS: /diensten page loads correctly after refactoring - services data imported from dienstenData.js
7. PASS: /voor/kappers niche page loads correctly with benefits and examples
8. PASS: /voor/coaches niche page loads correctly with benefits and examples
9. PASS: /diensten/webdesign service detail page loads correctly (AFTER FIX - added missing Layers import)
10. PASS: /rebranding page loads with correct SEO title 'Website Rebranding | Nieuwe Look voor Je Site | Yrvante'
11. PASS: /privacy page loads with correct SEO title 'Privacybeleid | Yrvante'
12. PASS: /calculator page works - YRVA10 discount code gives 10% off (€900 -> €810)
13. PASS: /pakketten page loads with all 4 pricing cards (€349, €500, €900, €1400)
14. PASS: Mobile responsive navigation works - hamburger menu shows all links

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'Layers' import from lucide-react causing ReferenceError on /diensten/webdesign page
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'Layers' to the import statement from lucide-react

critical_code_review_comments: DienstenPage.jsx refactoring successful - services and niches data correctly imported from /app/frontend/src/data/dienstenData.js
SEO.jsx correctly has entries for /rebranding and /privacy pages in both NL and EN languages
All niche pages (/voor/kappers, /voor/coaches, etc.) render correctly using data from dienstenData.js
Service detail pages (/diensten/webdesign) render correctly after Layers import fix
YRVA10 discount code functional - applies 10% discount correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27: Tested DienstenPage refactoring (data moved to dienstenData.js) and SEO additions. Fixed 1 critical bug: missing 'Layers' import in DienstenPage.jsx line 7-18 that caused /diensten/webdesign to crash with 'ReferenceError: Layers is not defined'. After fix, all pages load correctly. SEO titles for /rebranding ('Website Rebranding | Nieuwe Look voor Je Site | Yrvante') and /privacy ('Privacybeleid | Yrvante') are correct. YRVA10 discount code works (10% off). All 4 pricing cards visible on /pakketten (€349, €500, €900, €1400). Mobile navigation works with hamburger menu.
